In [9]:
SE_MATS_FDR = SE_MATS[(SE_MATS['FDR'] < 0.01) & (SE_MATS['IncLevelDifference'].abs() > 0.25)]

SE_MATS_FDR.to_csv("nease_df_G1_G0_DOX_SE_concact_38_FDR_0.01.csv")
In [11]:
SE_MATS_FDR.dtypes
Out[11]:
ID                      int64
GeneID                 object
geneSymbol             object
chr                    object
strand                 object
exonStart_0base         int64
exonEnd                 int64
upstreamES              int64
upstreamEE              int64
downstreamES            int64
downstreamEE            int64
ID.1                    int64
IJC_SAMPLE_1           object
SJC_SAMPLE_1           object
IJC_SAMPLE_2           object
SJC_SAMPLE_2           object
IncFormLen              int64
SkipFormLen             int64
PValue                float64
FDR                   float64
IncLevel1              object
IncLevel2              object
IncLevelDifference    float64
dtype: object
In [12]:
# Run NEASE analysis
events = nease.run(
    SE_MATS_FDR,
    organism='Human',  # or 'Mouse'
    input_type='rmats',
    remove_non_in_frame=True,
    only_divisible_by_3=False
)

/home/lijunma98/miniconda3/envs/NEASE/lib/python3.13/site-packages/nease/process.py:124: FutureWarning: Series.__getitem__ treating keys as positions is deprecated. In a future version, integer keys will always be treated as labels (consistent with DataFrame behavior). To access a value by position, use `ser.iloc[pos]`
  data['coord']=data.apply(lambda x:{x[0],x[1],x[2]}  ,axis = 1)

You selected to remove all exons that are predicted to disturb the ORF or known to result in a non-coding gene.
If you would like to change this option and include all exons, please change the parameter remove_non_in_frame to False. 

Input sequence provided is already in string format. No operation performed
Input sequence provided is already in string format. No operation performed

536 protein domains are affected by AS.

19 linear motifs are affected by AS.
89 interacting residue are affected by AS.

271 of the affected domains/motifs have known interactions.
2701 protein interactions/binding affected.

  p=int(paths [paths['pathway']==path][ppi_type])

nease_enr_Reactome.to_csv("SE_nease_enrichment_edge_Reactome_G1_G0_DOX_FDR_0.01.csv")
In [26]:
#plot nease enrichment for KEGG
nease_enr_KEGG=nease_enr_KEGG.sort_values(by='Nease score',ascending=False)
Term = nease_enr_KEGG['Pathway name'][:10]
Pvalues =nease_enr_KEGG['adj p_value'][:10]
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

plt.barh(Term[::-1],Pvalues[::-1] )
plt.title('NEASE enrichment KEGG')
plt.ylabel('Terms')
plt.xlabel('-log10(Adjusted P-value)')
plt.savefig('SE_nease_enrichment_G1_G0_DOX_edge_KEGG.pdf',format='pdf',bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
In [27]:
#plot nease enrichment for Reactome
nease_enr_Reactome=nease_enr_Reactome.sort_values(by='Nease score',ascending=False)
Term = nease_enr_Reactome['Pathway name'][:20]
Pvalues =nease_enr_Reactome['adj p_value'][:20]
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

plt.barh(Term[::-1],Pvalues[::-1] )
plt.title('NEASE enrichment Reactome')
plt.ylabel('Terms')
plt.xlabel('-log10(Adjusted P-value)')
plt.savefig('SE_nease_enrichment_G1_G0_DOX_edge_Reactome.pdf',format='pdf',bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()

SE_best_path

Enrichment of the pathway: Vesicle-mediated transport.

Overall p_value:  5.704299083226768e-15

In [138]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])


# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Vesicle-mediated transport')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Vesicle-mediated_transport.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

In [140]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])


# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Membrane Trafficking')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Membrane_Trafficking.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]


Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]


# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])



# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Organelle biogenesis and maintenance')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Organelle_biogenesis_and_maintenance.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]


Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]


# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])



# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Energy dependent regulation of mTOR by LKB1-AMPK')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Energy_dependent_regulation_of_mTOR_by_LKB1-AMPK.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

In [146]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])

# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Tight Junction KEGG')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Tight_junction_KEGG.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

In [148]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])

# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on FoxO signaling pathway KEGG')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_FoxO_signaling_pathway_KEGG.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])

# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Hippo signaling pathway KEGG')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Hippo_signaling_pathway_KEGG.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

In [152]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])

# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on Longevity regulating pathway KEGG')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_Longevity_regulating_pathway_KEGG.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()

In [154]:
# Extract genes and p-values
Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']

# Convert p-values to -log10 scale
log_pvalues = [-np.log10(p) for p in Pvalues]

Genes = SE_best_path['Spliced genes']
Pvalues = SE_best_path['p_value']
Pvalues=[ -np.log10(x) for x in Pvalues]

# Combine and sort by significance
sorted_data = sorted(zip(Genes, log_pvalues), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Select top N most significant genes
N = 10
top_genes, top_log_pvalues = zip(*sorted_data[:N])

# Plot
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(top_genes, top_log_pvalues)
plt.title('Top 10 Affected Edges Impact on AMPK signaling pathway KEGG')
plt.xlabel('-log10( P-value )')
plt.ylabel('Differentially Spliced Genes')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('Top_10_SE_nease_G1_G0_DOX_AMPK_signaling_pathway_KEGG.pdf', format='pdf')
plt.show()
